name: confluence-export-kit
description: Codex plugin for Confluence export-only workflows: unified config setup, page, space, org, page-with-descendants export, and confluence-markdown-exporter bootstrap.

interface.shortDescription: Export Confluence pages, spaces, and descendants to Markdown
interface.longDescription: confluence-export-kit provides export-only Confluence workflows powered by confluence-markdown-exporter. Configure auth and output defaults, then export single or multiple pages, full spaces, page descendants, or full organizations to local Markdown files.
defaultPrompt: Set my Confluence API key and default export output path so I can start exporting pages.
Export the Confluence space at <space-url> to a local Markdown folder.
Export one or more Confluence pages at <page-url> [<page-url> ...] to ./docs/.
